description: Sector overlay for vessel operators, shipping, ports, marine transportation, marine safety/security, and marine environmental documentation in Canada.

metadata.scope: Canada-only sector overlay controls for Maritime and Shipping. Intended to be used with canada_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Canadian federal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. Provincial/territorial obligations may apply and are not exhaustively encoded. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Compliance, exemptions and appeals under Canada Shipping Act, 2001
Marine Transportation Security Act and marine transportation regulatory framework
Small commercial vessel procedures and records templates

rules.title: Canada Shipping Act safety responsibility evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for authorized representative, vessel safety, operating procedure, emergency procedure, or CSA 2001 evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Vessel registration, certificate, or approval evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for vessel registration, certificate, inspection, approval, or Transport Canada documentation.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Transport Canada marine safety compliance materials

rules.title: Marine pollution or environmental protection evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for pollution prevention, marine environment, oil pollution, waste, or spill controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Canada Shipping Act 2001 and related regulations

rules.title: Marine transportation security evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for marine facility security, vessel security, security plan, restricted area, or MTSA evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
